headline: PPG Industries Inc. (NYSE:PPG): A Model of Steady, Quality Dividend Investing
summary: PPG Industries offers a reliable dividend with a 2.7% yield, strong growth history, and a sustainable payout, backed by high profitability and solid financial health.
